---
title: "pairedcorr"
generated: true
description: "Cross-correlation between two sets of variables."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:pairedcorr -->
```python
pairedcorr(X: Num[Array, '... c obs'], Y: Num[Array, '... d obs'], **kwargs) -> Num[Array, '... c d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:pairedcorr -->
Cross-correlation between two sets of variables.

Normalised version of [`pairedcov`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/pairedcov.qmd): each cross-covariance
entry is divided by the square root of the product of the
corresponding variances, i.e. the diagonal entries of
[`cov`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/cov.qmd) applied to `X` and to `Y` respectively.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:pairedcorr -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `c` × `obs` | — | First variable block; see [`pairedcov`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/pairedcov.qmd). |
| `Y` | `Num` | `...` × `d` × `obs` | — | Second variable block; see [`pairedcov`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/pairedcov.qmd). |
| `**kwargs` | `Any` | — | `{}` | — |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `c` × `d`. Cross-correlation block, `(..., c, d)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:pairedcorr -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
